overview: A premium iOS-style daily habit and progress tracking app. Log workouts, water intake, mood, reading, and meditation sessions — all organized by date and persisted across sessions.
features: Home screen showing yesterday's summary across all habit categories
5-tab bottom navigation: Workout, Hydration, Mood & Tasks, Reading, Meditation
Workout grid with 8 categories to log reps and sets per day
Hydration tracker with tap-to-add glasses and circular progress toward daily goal
Mood selector (emoji scale 1–5) plus freeform task list with add, complete, and delete
Reading grid with 6 genres to log pages or minutes per session
Meditation timer with 4 presets (5–20 min), golden ring progress, and auto-save
All data persisted by date in backend storage
